npcs.name: Mrs. Wellington
greetings: I shouldn't have to ask twice.
requests: My usual court isn't ready. This is unacceptable.
Bring me fresh towels immediately.
Someone left balls all over Court 1. Clean it up.

unsatisfied: I'll be speaking to the manager about this.
idle: The service here used to be much better.
Is that what passes for court maintenance?

npcs.name: Chad Blake
requests: Someone took my reserved court. Handle it.
I need a ball hopper at Court 2, like NOW.
My racket got scuffed. The pro shop better have a replacement.

unsatisfied: My dad's gonna hear about this.
idle: Check out this serve. Watch. WATCH.
I could've gone pro, you know.

npcs.name: Maria Santos
greetings: Oh hi there! Beautiful day, isn't it?
requests: Would you mind checking if Court 3 is free at 3pm?
Could you bring some water bottles to the patio when you get a chance?
I think I left my visor at Court 4. Could you check?

satisfied: You're the best! Here, take this.
unsatisfied: Oh no worries, I'll figure it out!

npcs.name: Bob Hendricks
greetings: Good morning! Or is it afternoon? Ha!
requests: Any chance you could grab me a cold drink from the pro shop?
My doubles partner hasn't shown up. Know anyone looking for a game?
Could you check the schedule for me? My eyes aren't what they used to be.

satisfied: You're a gem. Here's a little something for ya.
unsatisfied: Don't worry about it at all.
idle: Back in my day, we didn't have fancy clay courts...

npcs.name: Kevin Park
greetings: Is this... am I in the right place?
requests: Where exactly are the courts? I can't find them.
Do I need to sign in somewhere? I'm new.
My membership card isn't working at the gate. Can you help?

satisfied: Oh awesome, thank you! This place is so confusing.
unsatisfied: Oh... okay. I'll just... wander around I guess.
Sorry, was that a dumb question?
idle: This club is way bigger than I expected.
Everyone seems to know each other here...

npcs.name: Priya Sharma
greetings: Hey there, I'm a bit lost...
requests: Which courts are clay and which are hard? Does it matter?
I signed up for a lesson but I don't know where to go.
Is there a dress code? Someone gave me a weird look.

satisfied: Oh that makes sense! Thank you!
Great, I feel so much better now.
unsatisfied: Oh no... I hope I didn't mess anything up.
idle: I should probably actually learn the rules of tennis...
The garden here is so peaceful.

npcs.name: Diane Ross
greetings: I've been a member here for 15 years.
Where is the attendant? Oh, there you are.
requests: The patio umbrella is at the wrong angle. Fix it.
Those people on Court 4 are being entirely too loud.
I need the court swept before my 4 o'clock match.

unsatisfied: I'm writing a letter to the board.
idle: When I was club president, things were different.
The new members have no etiquette.

npcs.name: Tommy Chen
requests: Got any extra balls? I'm hitting serves and running out fast.
My water bottle is in the cart. Could you grab it for me?
Want to rally for a bit when you're on break? Ha, just kidding. Unless...

satisfied: Here, grab yourself a snack on me.
idle: Just trying to nail my backhand.
Tennis is therapy, am I right?

npcs.name: Hank Morris
greetings: Morning! Those clay courts won't groom themselves.
Hey there! How are the courts looking today?
Good to see ya. Ready to put in some work?
requests: Court 3 is looking rough after the morning matches. Time for a sweep.
The clay on Court 4 needs attention before the afternoon lesson.
Those courts need grooming. Grab the brush from the equipment shed.

satisfied: Now THAT's how you groom a court. Well done!
Beautiful work. The members will love it.
unsatisfied: Hmm, you might want another pass on that. A few spots are still rough.
Not bad for a rookie, but we can do better.
idle: A well-maintained court is a happy court.
Nothing beats the smell of fresh Har-Tru in the morning.
